ddls:
CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market segment */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market segment */,
  "segment_size" TEXT /* Size of the market segment (e.g., Large, Small) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the market segment */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the market segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market segment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the market segment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market segment */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected return percentage */,
  "volatility" TEXT /* Volatility percentage */,
  "current_shiller_pe" TEXT /* Current Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "max_shiller_pe" TEXT /* Maximum historical Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "median_shiller_pe" TEXT /* Median historical Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "min_shiller_pe" TEXT /* Minimum historical Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "25th_percentile_shiller_pe" TEXT /* 25th percentile historical Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "75th_percentile_shiller_pe" TEXT /* 75th percentile historical Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "eps_inception_date" TEXT /* Date when earnings per share (EPS) data began */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the market data (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return data entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market segment */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date the return data was recorded */,
  "expected_return" TEXT /* Expected return percentage */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Type of return (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility data entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market segment */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date the volatility data was recorded */,
  "volatility_percentage" TEXT /* Volatility percentage */,
  "volatility_type" TEXT /* Type of volatility (e.g., historical, implied) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatility_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shiller_pe" (
  "shiller_pe_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Shiller P/E data entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market segment */,
  "as_of_date" TEXT /* Date the Shiller P/E data was recorded */,
  "current_shiller_pe" TEXT /* Current Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "max_shiller_pe" TEXT /* Maximum historical Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "median_shiller_pe" TEXT /* Median historical Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "min_shiller_pe" TEXT /* Minimum historical Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "25th_percentile_shiller_pe" TEXT /* 25th percentile historical Shiller P/E ratio */,
  "75th_percentile_shiller_pe" TEXT /* 75th percentile historical Shiller P/E ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shiller_pe_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shiller_pe_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eps_data" (
  "eps_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EPS data entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market segment */,
  "eps_inception_date" TEXT /* Date when EPS data began */,
  "eps_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of EPS data (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eps_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_eps_data_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysts" (
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial analyst */,
  "analyst_name" TEXT /* Full name of the financial analyst */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the financial analyst */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the financial analyst (e.g., junior analyst, senior analyst, research head) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team that the financial analyst belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial analyst was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the financial analyst was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysts_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial analyst who generated the report */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market segment the report is about */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., market analysis, portfolio analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the market segment */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_return" TEXT /* Predicted return percentage */,
  "predicted_volatility" TEXT /* Predicted volatility percentage */,
  "model_details" TEXT /* Details of the predictive model used */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of predictive model used (e.g., ARIMA, machine learning) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market data being accessed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial analyst accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the market data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user permission association */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial analyst */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "report_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial analyst accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prediction_access" (
  "prediction_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction access event */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prediction being accessed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial analyst accessing the prediction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_access_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prediction_access_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial analyst receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., report update, prediction update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_team_lead FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead") REFERENCES analysts ("analyst_id")
)
